parameters.jsCode:
const feeds = [
  { url: 'https://www.investing.com/rss/news_95.rss', src: 'investing', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://www.investing.com/rss/news_11.rss', src: 'investing', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://www.investing.com/rss/central_banks.rss', src: 'investing', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://www.investing.com/rss/news_1.rss', src: 'investing', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://www.investing.com/rss/news_25.rss', src: 'investing', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://www.federalreserve.gov/feeds/press_monetary.xml', src: 'fed', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://www.ecb.europa.eu/rss/press.html', src: 'ecb', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://seekingalpha.com/feed.xml', src: 'seeking_alpha', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://search.cnbc.com/rs/search/combinedcms/view.xml?partnerId=wrss01&id=20910258', src: 'cnbc', type: 'rss' },
  { url: 'https://www.reddit.com/r/wallstreetbets/new.json?limit=5', src: 'reddit', type: 'json' },
  { url: 'https://www.reddit.com/r/commodities/new.json?limit=5', src: 'reddit', type: 'json' }
];
return feeds.map(f => ({ json: f }));

parameters.query: SELECT LEFT(description, 100) as d FROM geopolitical_events WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
INSERT INTO geopolitical_events (event_type, description, sentiment_score, affected_assets, source, impact_level, timestamp) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::text[], $5, $6, NOW());

parameters.query: SELECT LEFT(description, 100) as d FROM geopolitical_events WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
